svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.3.6"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="ZpBjAv8A84hi90Kds7Pi"> <mxGraphModel dx="2404" dy="1948" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title UPI Payment Flow — Push & Collect (with Failures)

actor Payer
actor Payee
participant \"UPI App\n(Payer)\" as PayerApp
participant \"UPI App\n(Payee)\" as PayeeApp
participant \"PSP Bank\n(Payer Side)\" as PSP_Payer
participant \"PSP Bank\n(Payee Side)\" as PSP_Payee
participant \"NPCI\n(UPI Switch)\" as NPCI
participant \"Issuer Bank\n(Payer Bank)\" as Issuer
participant \"Acquirer Bank\n(Payee Bank)\" as Acquirer

== PUSH PAYMENT FLOW ==

Payer -> PayerApp : Enter payee VPA + amount\nEnter MPIN
PayerApp -> PSP_Payer : Initiate Push Payment
PSP_Payer -> PSP_Payer : Validate app, device, limits, risk
PSP_Payer -> NPCI : Route push request
NPCI -> Issuer : Debit request

alt Debit Rejected
 Issuer -> NPCI : Reject (MPIN / Balance / Risk)
 NPCI -> PSP_Payer : Failure response
 PSP_Payer -> PayerApp : Show failure
else Debit Successful
 Issuer -> NPCI : Debit success
 NPCI -> Acquirer : Credit request

 alt Credit Failed
 Acquirer -> NPCI : Credit failure
 NPCI -> Issuer : Reversal request
 Issuer -> NPCI : Reversal success
 NPCI -> PSP_Payer : Failed (Reversed)
 PSP_Payer -> PayerApp : Payment reversed
 else Credit Successful
 Acquirer -> NPCI : Credit success
 NPCI -> PSP_Payer : Success
 NPCI -> PSP_Payee : Success
 PSP_Payer -> PayerApp : Payment successful
 PSP_Payee -> PayeeApp : Money received
 end
end

== COLLECT / REQUEST (PULL) FLOW ==

Payee -> PayeeApp : Create collect request
PayeeApp -> PSP_Payee : Initiate collect
PSP_Payee -> NPCI : Route collect request
NPCI -> PSP_Payer : Forward collect request
PSP_Payer -> PayerApp : Notify collect request

alt Payer Declines / Timeout
 PayerApp -> PSP_Payer : Reject / Expire
 PSP_Payer -> NPCI : Collect rejected
 NPCI -> PSP_Payee : Notify rejection
 PSP_Payee -> PayeeApp : Collect failed
else Payer Approves
 Payer -> PayerApp : Approve + MPIN
 PayerApp -> PSP_Payer : Approve collect
 PSP_Payer -> NPCI : Debit request
 NPCI -> Issuer : Debit request

 alt Debit Failed
 Issuer -> NPCI : Debit rejected
 NPCI -> PSP_Payer : Failure
 PSP_Payer -> PayerApp : Payment failed
 NPCI -> PSP_Payee : Failure
 PSP_Payee -> PayeeApp : Collect failed
 else Debit Successful
 Issuer -> NPCI : Debit success
 NPCI -> Acquirer : Credit request

 alt Credit Failed
 Acquirer -> NPCI : Credit failure
 NPCI -> Issuer : Reversal
 Issuer -> NPCI : Reversal success
 NPCI -> PSP_Payer : Failed (Reversed)
 NPCI -> PSP_Payee : Failed (Reversed)
 else Credit Successful
 Acquirer -> NPCI : Credit success
 NPCI -> PSP_Payer : Success
 NPCI -> PSP_Payee : Success
 PSP_Payer -> PayerApp : Payment successful
 PSP_Payee -> PayeeApp : Money received
 end
 end
end

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="UNOagj38LF-n-zt_1JNp-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1940" width="1213" x="-290" y="-40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
